scripts.build: tsc -b && vite build && npm run build:worker
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler pages project create nai-prompt-manager --production-branch main || true && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=nai-prompt-manager --commit-message=deploy
scripts.manual-deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=nai-prompt-manager --branch=main --commit-message=deploy
